author: mdelobelle
description: Add attributes to internal links with the values of target note's frontmatter attributes.

manifest.author: mdelobelle & Emile
manifest.description: Add properties and menu options to links and style them!
manifest.name: Supercharged Links

name: Supercharged Links

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Fixed supercharging of list links in embedded bases

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Fixed properties and bases supercharging for Obsidian v1.11+

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Basic [notebook navigator](https://notebooknavigator.com/) support

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description:
* Change CSS selectors for Bases to prevent duplicate decorations by @mdbraber in https://github.com/mdelobelle/obsidian_supercharged_links/pull/264
* Fixed aliased links not properly styled within Bases (Closes #250)

## New Contributors
* @mdbraber made their first contribution in https://github.com/mdelobelle/obsidian_supercharged_links/pull/264

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description:
- Added option to disable Obsidian Bases support (closes #258)
- Fixed (most likely) a crash when having dataview enabled (closes #259)

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - fix: Linking to a note that has a property with spaces crashes live preview

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Fix: Properties with spaces would not be accepted. This turns properties with spaces by replacing spaces with dashes (-) in the CSS. The UI automatically handles this conversion. Closes #253

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description:
- Folder notes support (closes #107)
- Similar notes support (#252)

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Fixed Omnisearch support

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description:
- Support for bases embedded in notes
- Support for Breadcrumbs codeblocks
- Fixed some codeblocks being spuriously and incorrectly styled unintentionally: Such requests must be manually requested in Issues
- Improved reactivity to active plugins to reduce overhead of more expensive selects (eg, if Breadcrumbs is not installed/active, Supercharged Links will not attempt to style BC codeblocks. Similar for bases).

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description:
- Support for the new bases core plugin (Closes #245)
- Updated dependencies

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Fix: No update on scroll

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description:
- Fix: Live preview not showing supercharged colours (#223)
- Feat: Incremental updates of live preview supercharged links for increased performance (#220)
- Feat: support data links as URLs for inline images (#221)

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Fix possible null crash

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - You can now use YAML Properties to dynamically style your links! For example, you can define a `color` property in your Properties and use that to choose the color of your links. You can even set images in the Properties to prepend it before links! See the README for an example setup. Thanks @barryvan

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Fix console error on closing a file or reload

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Fix: Errors in properties window due to lack of error handling. Closes #197 and #195

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Support for properties pane (Obsidian insider release)

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description:
- @OptionalM Fix: Notes with the same name but in different folders get the same styling applied to them 
- @OptionalM Fix: SL doesn't work for links with % in the name

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Fixed regression #173

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Rudimentary support for the bookmarks panel (insider release)

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Ensure styles are loaded when the plugin is loaded; style links with spaces in them. by @dsummersl in https://github.com/mdelobelle/obsidian_supercharged_links/pull/157
* Fix error when cachedFile is null by @johanfriis in https://github.com/mdelobelle/obsidian_supercharged_links/pull/143

## New Contributors
* @dsummersl made their first contribution in https://github.com/mdelobelle/obsidian_supercharged_links/pull/157
* @johanfriis made their first contribution in https://github.com/mdelobelle/obsidian_supercharged_links/pull/143

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdelobelle/obsidian_supercharged_links/compare/0.9.3...0.9.4

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Fix: Did not automatically update links when typing in a note (regression bug from last version)

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: Fix: Tabs aren't immediately supercharged when immediately opening a file in it.

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: Improved supercharging of tabs. Should now update more immediately.

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description:
This release is for Obsidian insider releases 0.16.0+
- Feature: Also supercharges tab headers
- Fix: Automatic activation of supercharged links snippet was broken in 0.16.0+

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description:
- Removed context menu options that allow editing metadata. This functionality is moved to https://github.com/mdelobelle/metadatamenu . 
- Fixed suggest modals not working in Insider release 0.15.3+

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Modals now work in popout windows (Thanks @kometenstaub !)

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description:
- Supports Obsidian v0.15.0 and up (Thanks @nothingislost !)
    - Supercharged Links should also work in popout windows. If not, please let me know.
- Allow using custom configuration directories (Thanks @r4zzz4k !)
- Support for Omnisearch plugin (Thanks @chrisgrieser !)

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Improved markdown links support

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: Fix: #80 does not work in live preview for markdown links.

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Fixed annoying cursor jumping in latest insider release

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description:
- Now automatically activates snippet
- Fixed issues with backlinks in editor supercharging

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: Fix: Does not generate if .obsidian/snippet does not exist.

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: Fixed supercharged-links-gen.css not generating

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: Fix crash on unresolved links.

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: New: Style settings plugin support! Go to the Supercharged links settings to get started.

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Support "Another quick switcher" plugin

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: - Now also supercharged links autocompleter

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description:
- Supercharge backlinks in document
- Supercharge quick switcher

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: Hopefully better performance in this version! Let us know if you keep having issues.

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: More performance optimizations

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description: Fixed performance issues with backlinks panel.

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description: Dataview api for inline field parsing

releases.author: HEmile
releases.description:
Properly implemented CodeMirror 6 and live preview supercharging. 
Note: This is a breaking change, you might need to update your snippets to get things working properly! Consult the README for the latest advices.

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description: fixes #56

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description: Supercharge links in live preview

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description: Hotfix for empty inline fields

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description: Minor settings change

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description: fixed bugs with tags parsing and a small crash

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description:
New command to create a css boiler plate for your styling:
[Cmd + P] or / : Supercharged-links: CSS Snipper Helper

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description:
- Now (optionally) supercharges links the edit mode
- Now (optionally) supercharges links in other views:
    - File browser (closes #33)
    - Backlinks and forward links pane
    - Starred pane
    - Breadcrumbs plugin
    - Graph analysis plugin
- Now also adds tags that appear in a note using `#tag-name` to the `data-link-tags` attribute (closes #27)
- Fixed links to headings and blocks not being supercharged (closes #23 )

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description: Better field select

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description: Better modal titles

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description: Setting to exclude inline fields from the target for link attributes (large file causing target to fail in dataview)

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description: Manage fileClass fields type (basic input, select, select multi, cycle)  and preset values (array of options)

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description: Access fields management from command palette and Alt+o hotkey

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description: Fixed context menu hidden fields

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description: Style your links with the value of inline fields (Dataview fields)

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description:
Ignore fields globally
Give a note a category (fileClass) to define which fields should be managed for this class of note

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description:
Add dataview fields and front matter fields by right-click:
- on the link
- on the file in file explorer
- on a day in the calendar
- on the more option menu of the file

You can disable extra options display in context menu from the settings (

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description:
Better frontmatter detection
Now preserving inlineField formating

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description:
Access options for changing inline fields and frontmatter from everywere:
- internal-link
- calendar
- file explorer
- more-options menu

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description: Manage preset values from a note

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description: Change inlineField values by right clicking on the internal link

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description:
Extra options for internal link context menu:
- update values
- preset values
- manage multi-values properties
- cycle through preset values

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description: Make array attribute space-separated for better stlyling specificity

releases.author: mdelobelle
releases.description:
Adding support for arrays, number and boolean in frontmatter attributes thanks to @Jayby18
Better setting's UX (bigger text area)
